note: LIFELINE LANE: deploy ATLAS BRAIN LOOP - the compounding operational intelligence: learning ledger (atlas.learnings, seeded with all June-13/14 incidents), reads ledger+guardian issues every 2min, records/compounds knowledge, tracks outcome trends, publishes brain-loop.json heartbeat PROVING it's alive + reading the ledger. Guardian updated to verify brain liveness + ledger-reading (BRAIN_OFFLINE/BRAIN_NOT_READING_LEDGER alarms) + writes local report handoff. The closed detect->diagnose->record->prevent loop.

steps.note: deploy compounding brain loop + ledger + guardian brain-check

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Brain Loop (compounding operational intelligence + learning ledger)
After=postgresql.service
[Service]
Type=simple
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/atlas_brain_loop.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=15
Nice=5
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
